markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's content service for Speechmatics' PLG strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Pitch:** GrowthX offers a "step change" in AI search visibility by scaling content production to 5 articles/week. Their process uses a custom "artifact" knowledge base and agentic workflows to ensure high quality and relevance, avoiding generic "AI slop."](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**The Problem:** Speechmatics' current content efforts (using Profound, Ahrefs, Surfer SEO) are too slow and deliver only "incremental" impact, failing to achieve the necessary scale for their new product-led growth (PLG) motion.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**The Conflict:** GrowthX's work for competitor Deepgram was addressed. They use strict team siloing to prevent information sharing, while process improvements from any client are rolled out to all.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**The Path Forward:** Speechmatics is interested but must first prioritize other PLG initiatives. A decision is pending, with a potential follow-up from their content lead.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

## Topics

### Speechmatics' Challenge: Scaling for PLG

  - [Speechmatics is shifting from a sales-led to a hybrid product-led growth (PLG) motion, driven by the growth of the voice agent space.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [**Goal:** Achieve a "step change" in AI search visibility to support this PLG motion, as current efforts are too slow.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Strong non-English language capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Focus on regulated industries (e.g., financial services, legal tech).](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Competitors:** Deepgram, Assembly, Sonioxx.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: Scalable Content Engine

  - [GrowthX's service is a "white glove" content creation engine designed to deliver rapid, high-quality content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Engagement Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8 weeks):** Strategy & calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - [Week 1: Create V1 of "artifacts" (ICP, product, writing guidelines).](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
          - [Week 2–3: Develop content strategy & roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - [Week 4: Publish first article for quality calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (12 months):** Scale production to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Time to Value:**](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Early signals within 3–6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Significant traffic uptick expected in Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### GrowthX's Process: Artifacts & Agentic Workflows

  - [The process uses a custom "artifact" knowledge base and agentic workflows to ensure content is relevant and high-quality.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Artifacts:** A "living" knowledge base (ICP, product info, writing guidelines) that provides context for all content.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [**Agentic Workflows:** Custom pipelines for each step (research, drafting, SEO, fact-checking) that use the artifacts for context.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [**Research Example:** An agent synthesizes info from multiple sources and self-evaluates quality, rerunning if a score isn't met.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Human-in-the-Loop:** Experts can edit or give commands at any stage (e.g., "add 3 bullet points for a full-stack developer").](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [**Customization:** Workflows are tailored to client needs (e.g., medical doctor review for Biologica).](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

### Future Handover & Platform Access

  - [GrowthX is building a platform to enable client autonomy post-engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [**Current State:** A white-glove service where GrowthX's team executes all work.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [**Future State (6+ months):** Clients can log in, select assignments, and execute workflows autonomously, with GrowthX available for additional services.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [**Today:** Clients receive all created content, artifacts, and the full content OS if the engagement ends.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Lauren King:** Discuss the GrowthX proposition with the Speechmatics team.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [**Lauren King:** Potentially have the Speechmatics content lead follow up with Tyler Pavlas.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Send follow-up resources to Lauren King.](https://fathom.video/share/LAg-RBVxDLT-s6R5QgNo8L1MysY5GB8d?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
